{{Quote|Lord Jabba's sources inform him that Wat Tambor is now on Xagobah. He has taken refuge in his fortress there. Republic troops have laid siege to his hideout, using a clone army led by a Jedi Master named Glynn-Beti.|[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], to [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="BF:ANT" />}}
The '''Second Battle of Xagobah''' was a major battle during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] which took place during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. It occurred concurrently with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] assassination attempt on [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]].

==Events<ref name="BF:ANT" />==
===Prelude===
{{Quote|The marshaling of our other forces on the Outer Rim—at Xagobah, Siskeen, Clak'dor VII, and Sluis Van—is also near completion. The war will soon be decided.|[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]|<ref name="Republic 73">[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]]</ref>}}
After retreating from a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] offensive in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] and [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] began marshaling the majority of its [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] at its strongholds in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in an attempt to draw in the Republic. [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]] was one of these [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress worlds]], serving as the retreat of [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] and the location of his [[Mazariyan]] citadel.

Eager to capture Tambor, the Republic sent a force led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Glynn-Beti]] to lay siege to Xagobah. Unbeknownst to the Republic, a high-ranking [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] official had placed bounties on the heads of leaders of the Separatists, and Wat Tambor had become the target of the young [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The Republic positioned an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] to coordinate the battle from high orbit, while Glynn-Beti and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Ulu Ulix]] led the ground assault and starfighter ace [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] provided air support.<ref name="BF:ANT" />

===The battle===
[[File:BobaFett_6_art.jpg|thumb|left|220px|The Battle of Xagobah]]
Xagobah was one of the most brutal battlefronts of the Clone Wars. The planet's sticky mucus ground hindered movement, while the thick purple-black clouds of fungal spores pumped out of Mazariyan reduced visibility and obscured the battlefield. Wat Tambor used [[Malvil-tree|Malvil tree]] spores to camouflage his vessels. Swarms of Vulture droids hid in these fungal clouds and strafed the clone trench line. The fungal forests surrounding the citadel contained carnivorous [[Flimmel tree|Flimmel trees]] that snatched any beings that wandered too close.<ref name="BF:ANT" /> 

The Republic's forces unsuccessfully besieged Mazariyan for weeks. A network of trenches were dug 500 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] away from the fortress. The waves of clones that charged from the trenches were met by the hordes of battle droids that marched out of the citadel's entrance. The few clones that reached the walls of the citadel were repelled by its biological defenses. Javelin-like spines shot out to impale troopers that got too close, while spools of razor-sharp fungal vines blocked the entrance. Very few clones made it inside, but none survived. Master Glynn-Beti tasked a team of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] with infiltrating the citadel. They were paralyzed by [[Xabar|Xabar fungal]] tentacles, cocooned in the walls, and had their bodily fluids slowly drained to feed the living citadel.<ref name="BF:ANT" />          

When Boba Fett arrived on Xagobah to assassinate Wat Tambor, Master Glynn-Beti launched a large assault against the citadel. Legions of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/is]], and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] charged the fortress and bombarded it from dug-in positions. Wat Tambor had hidden the full power of his forces and launched a counterattack during the Republic's push. Thousands of battle droids, [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]], and heavy vehicles streamed out of Mazariyan to meet the outnumbered clone army and break the siege. The clones managed to hold their own against the seemingly endless swarm of droids, but were unable to advance. In an attempt to eliminate the Republic's air support, Wat Tambor loaded a drone [[Robot ramship|ram ship]] with explosives under the cover of a fungal cloud and programmed it to ram the Republic's assault ship in orbit. Anticipating such a move, Ulu Ulix took a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] and raced toward the ramship, but he was shot down by enemy fire. Boba Fett intercepted the falling Ulu and saved the young Jedi's life, bringing him back to Glynn-Beti.<ref name="BF:ANT" />

As Boba Fett drew closer to the citadel walls in a stolen [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]], he became caught up in Tambor's counterattack. A droideka shot him off his swoop and he crashed 200 meters from the citadel. As he charged towards the citadel's entrance, he was forced to defend himself from both clones and droids. At this point, Anakin Skywalker led a squadron of [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi interceptors]] in a strike against the fortress, managing to blow a large hole in the structure. A [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droid]] fired a volley of missiles at Anakin's starfighter, but the experienced pilot was able to evade the missiles and cause them to impact the ramship, triggering its detonation. The energy pulse from the explosion temporarily scrambled the battle droids' circuits, allowing Boba Fett to infiltrate the Mazariyan citadel through the hole carved by Republic fire. Spines and razor vines blocked his path, but he used a Malvil spore-globe to force the fungal defenses to wither and retreat.<ref name="BF:ANT" /> 

While the battle continued outside, Boba Fett confronted and attempted to assassinate Wat Tambor, but the Techno Union Foreman was able to escape thanks to the help of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], who had arrived on Xagobah to extract him. Despite being only 12 years old, the young bounty hunter managed to put up a fight, and narrowly escaped with his life. At some point during the battle, General Grievous cut down the [[Iron Knight]] [[Firkrann (Jedi)|Firkrann]] in Xagobah's fungal forest.<ref name="Insider86" /> Repeated bombardment of the citadel overwhelmed its ability to repair itself with [[Nanotech|nanotechs]]. Large portions of the citadel were blown away, and clone troopers managed to breach the entrance with [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. While under fire from clone troopers, Boba launched a [[Liquid-cable launcher/Legends|liquid-cable]] into a faraway tree and escaped the citadel. Boba Fett left in ''[[Slave I/Legends|Slave I]]'' and attempted to shoot down Wat Tambor as he escaped in his [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Harcell''-class interstellar trasnport]], but he was attacked by a [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]] (which Boba Fett believed was piloted by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]). ''Slave I'' was severely damaged, but repaired by Anakin Skywalker on a nearby asteroid. After this departure, the Siege of Xagobah dragged on for several months, but eventually the Confederacy was forced to surrender the world to the Republic.<ref name="BF:P" />

== Behind the scenes ==
The Battle of Xagobah in the ''[[Star Wars: Boba Fett (novel series)|Boba Fett]]'' novel series was identified as the Second Battle of Xagobah in ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''. This also establishes the Battle of Xagobah as having taken place after the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]].<ref name="TCWCG" />
